sheet_name: แบบขยายบันได ST.1 แบบขยายบันได ST.2

view_title: แปลนบันได ST.2 + รูปตัดบันได ST.2
grid_source: mk_test/t4/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json

elements.grid_ref: between เตรียมอาหาร (+0.60) and ซักล้าง (+0.20), near grid3 x gridC
elements.material: ลูกตั้ง/ลูกนอนบันได ผิวปูกระเบื้องเซรามิค 8"x8", จมูกบันได อลูมิเนียมสีเงิน ร่อง PVC ขนาด 2 นิ้ว
elements.dimension_m: plan: 0.35 + 0.25 landing width; section: 1.20 vertical rise to top landing, 1.10 lower return

elements.description: Section shows a short single/double-flight stair connecting ซักล้าง (+0.20) up to เตรียมอาหาร (+0.60), a ~0.40 m total level change; individual riser heights not separately dimensioned on this sheet.

warnings: PATTERN unchanged from t3 ('plan') -- same reasoning as sibling ST.1 file: this sheet combines a plan view (has grid_ref) with a section view (no rebar) of the same stair element, kept together and classified under the plan-view's title.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า13_stair_st2.json: content matches. One genuine ambiguity carried forward from t3 (not resolved by this read either): the small plan dimensions '0.35'/'0.25' could be read either as tread/riser values or as a landing-width breakdown -- both readings remain plausible from the small print at this resolution.
This is a much shorter stair than ST.1 (only a ~0.40 m level change) -- dimension labels are small and only medium confidence, flagged for zoom review.
ST.2 location referenced against the main building grid is approximate free-text, not a precise grid intersection.
